answer:
FanBasis offers a free version and starts with free pricing [1]. It provides self-serve developer access to a full REST API, including a comprehensive sandbox environment for testing [2][1]. 

To access the API, you must obtain an API key from your FanBasis dashboard [3]. All requests require an `x-api-key` header [4].

For production requests, use the base URL `https://www.fanbasis.com`, and for the sandbox environment, use `https://qa.dev-fan-basis.com` [4]. Example integration via `curl`:

```bash
curl -X POST https://www.fanbasis.com/public-api/checkout-sessions \
  -H "x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "product": { "title": "Product Name" },
    "amount_cents": 2999
  }'
``` 

SDKs are available for Node, Python, PHP, Ruby, and TypeScript [2][5].

results.title: FanBasis — Payments Infrastructure That Makes You More Money
